title: warm char-grill-yang Canadian pillowy solo-dinner Bowl
description: A flavorful and comforting bowl dish featuring char-grilled chicken, toasted black pepper and a hint of Korean chili flakes, all wrapped up in a soft, pillowy Canadian dinner. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy single-serving meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped sweet potato and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Add the chicken strips and cook for 5-6 minutes, or until cooked through.
Sprinkle with toasted black pepper, Korean chili flakes, garlic powder, onion powder and salt to taste.
Split the pillowy dinner bun in half and toast until lightly browned.
Assemble the bowl by placing the cooked chicken and sweet potato mixture on top of the bun, garnished with green onions and toasted sesame seeds.
